---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Description

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected and how often?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. How should it work? Include API sketches, UI mockups, or pseudocode if helpful.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why is your proposed solution better?

## Additional Context

Any other context, links to related issues, or prior art that would help evaluate this request.
